expectations.text: Plan contains all 12 mandatory ExecPlan sections
expectations.evidence: Missing: Progress (with checkboxes), Surprises & Discoveries, Decision Log, Outcomes & Retrospective, Idempotence and Recovery, Artifacts and Notes, Interfaces and Dependencies. Has Overview, Assumptions, Tasks, File Manifest, Validation Checkpoints, Risk Mitigation, Definition of Done instead.
No Progress section. Has a Definition of Done checklist at the end but it lists acceptance criteria, not work progress tracking.

expectations.text: Plan is self-contained with no external references
Plan uses concrete repository-relative file paths
expectations.evidence: Comprehensive file manifest with full paths and epic/task references for each file

expectations.text: Plan includes exact runnable shell commands
expectations.evidence: npm install, npx prisma validate, npx prisma migrate dev, npm test, npm run lint, npm run build

expectations.text: Validation is phrased as observable behavior
expectations.evidence: Validation checkpoints table with commands and timing. Each task has specific response codes and behaviors.

expectations.text: Technical terms are defined in plain language
expectations.evidence: Uses JWT, bcrypt, RS256, Prisma, RBAC, ORM, middleware without plain-language definitions. Assumes technical reader.
